items.title: Once your teams are bought in, how do you track it?
items.title_zh: 一旦你的团队被收购，你如何跟踪它？
items.description: Once your teams are bought in, how do you track it? Usage is worth watching (e.g. a dashboard), but it measures activity, not return. A better question: would you have spent engineering effort on this anyway? If yes, how much and what woul…
items.description_zh: 一旦你的团队被收购，你如何跟踪它？使用情况值得关注（例如仪表板），但它衡量的是活动，而不是回报。一个更好的问题：无论如何，您会在这方面花费工程精力吗？如果是的话，多少钱以及什么......

items.title: In practice that means giving Claude ways to verify its own work end to end.
items.title_zh: 实际上，这意味着为 Claude 提供端到端验证其工作的方法。
items.description: In practice that means giving Claude ways to verify its own work end to end. It means enabling auto mode for permissions, defaulting on automated code review and security review, and using interfaces that let you manage multiple agents at…
items.description_zh: 实际上，这意味着为 Claude 提供端到端验证其工作的方法。这意味着启用权限自动模式，默认自动代码审查和安全审查，以及使用可让您管理多个代理的界面......
